race.description: Save The Date 26/6 Gatton Cup Calcutta Bm60 Hcp
race.comment: HARD AS BROK (2) resumed from a long break with a strong effort to finish fourth at Ipswich. Fitter and looks well placed here. Hard to hold out. SHEZA'S DESTINY (4) placed fresh at Ipswich then got off the mark there with an overdue maiden win. Racing well and expected to measure up again. ELUSIVE DOMINA (10) raced on speed and fought on well to finish fourth at the Sunny Coast last time. This is easier and draws to box seat and prove hard to beat again. ZOUSAIN GIRL (13) was an easy winner last time and although this tougher plummets in the weights.  BRITANNIA ROSE (12) will find this easier.
